goal: Full-stack engineer + AI builder — capable of building production systems like LUCI, HHA ops assistant, and SaaS products

phases.title: Foundation — How the Web Actually Works
phases.goal: Understand the real mental model behind everything you already built

modules.title: The Internet, HTTP, and APIs
lessons: How a request travels from browser to server and back
HTTP methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE — what they mean and when to use them
Status codes: 200, 401, 404, 500 — reading them like a native
Headers, bodies, and JSON — the anatomy of a request
REST vs other paradigms — why REST won
Hands-on: use curl and httpie to hit real APIs including LUCI's own /chat endpoint

modules.title: The Terminal — Your Real Interface
lessons: Navigation, files, permissions — the commands you use every day explained deeply
stdin, stdout, stderr — piping and redirection
Environment variables and .env files — why LUCI uses them
Processes, PIDs, signals — what systemctl is actually doing
SSH basics — how you'll connect to lucid-luci
Hands-on: write a bash script that checks LUCI's health and sends a Telegram message

modules.title: Git — Version Control as a Superpower
lessons: The mental model: snapshots not diffs
commit, push, pull, branch, merge — the core 20% you use 80% of the time
Reading git log and git diff like a pro
Fixing mistakes: reset, revert, stash
Branch workflows: feature branches, PRs, code review culture
Hands-on: properly version the entire LUCI workspace with a clean .gitignore

phases.title: Python — The Language You're Already Using, Deeply
phases.goal: Go from 'it works' to 'I understand why it works'

modules.title: Python Fundamentals — The Real Ones
lessons: Data types deeply: strings, ints, floats, bools — mutability and why it matters
Lists, dicts, sets, tuples — when to use each and why
Functions: args, kwargs, defaults, *args, **kwargs
List comprehensions and generator expressions
Error handling: try/except/finally — reading tracebacks like LUCI's logs
Hands-on: rewrite one of LUCI's utility functions from scratch

modules.title: Python Intermediate — How LUCI is Actually Built
lessons: Classes and OOP: when to use them, when not to
Decorators: what @app.get actually does
Context managers: with open() and why
Async/await: how LUCI handles multiple requests at once
Modules and imports: why LUCI uses sys.path.insert
Hands-on: add a new feature to luci_audit.py using everything above

modules.title: Python for Data — The HHA Business Case
lessons: Reading and writing CSV, JSON, Excel files
pandas basics: DataFrames, filtering, groupby
Cleaning messy data: the real skill
Basic statistics: mean, median, percentiles — reading a remittance file
Visualizing data with matplotlib
Hands-on: load a real HHA remittance file and find the top 3 denial patterns

phases.title: Web Development — HTML, CSS, Modern JS
phases.goal: Understand and extend LUCI's web UI confidently

modules.title: HTML — Structure and Semantics
lessons: The DOM: what it is and why JavaScript can manipulate it
Semantic HTML: why section vs div matters for real apps
Forms, inputs, events — how the LUCI chat box works
Accessibility basics — why aria labels exist
HTML in Python: how FastAPI serves the LUCI page
Hands-on: add a new panel to the LUCI web UI in pure HTML

modules.title: CSS — Modern Styling
lessons: The box model: margin, padding, border — finally understood
Flexbox: how LUCI's layout is built
CSS Grid: when to use it over flexbox
CSS variables: how LUCI's dark theme works
Responsive design: media queries
Hands-on: restyle the LUCI health dashboard to match your taste

modules.title: JavaScript — Modern ES2024
lessons: const, let — why var is dead
Arrow functions, template literals, destructuring
Promises and async/await — how LUCI's frontend calls /chat
fetch API — reading the LUCI frontend JavaScript
DOM manipulation: querySelector, addEventListener
Hands-on: add a keyboard shortcut to the LUCI web UI

phases.title: TypeScript — The Skill That Gets You Hired
phases.goal: Write typed code that catches bugs before runtime

modules.title: TypeScript Fundamentals
lessons: Why TypeScript: the real business case
Types, interfaces, and type aliases
Optional and union types
Generics: what List<T> actually means
TypeScript with async/await
Hands-on: convert a LUCI JavaScript file to TypeScript

phases.title: Databases — SQL and Beyond
phases.goal: Store, query, and understand data at a professional level

modules.title: SQL Fundamentals
lessons: Tables, rows, columns — the relational model
SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, LIMIT
JOINs: inner, left, right — with real examples
Aggregations: COUNT, SUM, GROUP BY, HAVING
Indexes: why queries get slow and how to fix them
Hands-on: query the LUCI trading SQLite database

modules.title: Database Design
lessons: Normalization: 1NF, 2NF, 3NF — in plain English
Primary keys, foreign keys, constraints
Designing the HHA pre-bill validation database
SQLite vs PostgreSQL — when to use each
Migrations: changing a schema without losing data
Hands-on: design and build the HHA denial tracking schema

phases.title: APIs and Backend — FastAPI in Depth
phases.goal: Build production-grade APIs like LUCI's backend

modules.title: FastAPI Fundamentals
lessons: Routes, path parameters, query parameters
Request and response models with Pydantic
Middleware: what runs before every request
Authentication: API keys, JWT tokens
Background tasks: how LUCI's auto_extract_memory works
Hands-on: build the HHA pre-bill validation API

modules.title: External APIs and Integrations
lessons: Reading API documentation like a professional
Authentication patterns: Bearer tokens, OAuth, API keys
Rate limiting and retry logic
Webhooks: receiving data vs polling
The HHAeXchange API: EVV submission and aggregation
Hands-on: connect to the eMedNY EVV API

phases.title: React — Modern Frontend
phases.goal: Build the HHA ops dashboard as a real React app

modules.title: React Fundamentals
lessons: Components: the mental model
Props and state: data flow in React
useState and useEffect — the hooks you use 90% of the time
Event handling in React
Conditional rendering and lists
Hands-on: build the HHA denial triage component

modules.title: React Intermediate
lessons: Custom hooks: extracting logic
useContext: sharing state without prop drilling
React Query: fetching and caching API data
Forms: controlled vs uncontrolled
Error boundaries and loading states
Hands-on: build the HHA billing readiness dashboard

modules.title: React with TypeScript
lessons: Typing props and state
Typing API responses
Generic components
TypeScript patterns in real React apps
Hands-on: convert HHA components to TypeScript

phases.title: AI Engineering — The Skill of This Decade
phases.goal: Build production AI systems the way LUCI is built — but better

modules.title: LLMs and Prompt Engineering
lessons: How LLMs actually work — tokens, context windows, temperature
System prompts vs user prompts vs assistant turns
Prompt engineering patterns: few-shot, chain-of-thought, ReAct
Why LUCI's persona sometimes fails and how to fix it
Evaluating model outputs: what makes a good response
Hands-on: redesign LUCI's system prompt using professional prompt engineering

modules.title: Building AI Applications
lessons: The Anthropic API: messages, tools, streaming
The Ollama API: local models, embeddings
RAG: retrieval augmented generation — how to add knowledge to any model
Tool use and function calling — how LUCI Code works
Memory systems: episodic, semantic, procedural
Hands-on: add RAG to the HHA assistant using denial pattern documents

modules.title: AI Agents and Automation
lessons: Agent loops: plan, act, observe, repeat
Multi-step task execution without human intervention
Safety and guardrails — why mini-BEAST has an allowlist
Evaluating and improving agent behavior
Deploying agents as services
Hands-on: build the HHA pre-bill validation agent end to end

phases.title: DevOps and Deployment
phases.goal: Ship and maintain real software like a professional

modules.title: Docker and Containers
lessons: What Docker actually does and why it matters
Dockerfile: building an image
docker-compose: running multi-service apps
Volumes and networking
Containerizing LUCI for lucid-luci deployment
Hands-on: Dockerize the HHA validation service

modules.title: Linux Systems and systemd
lessons: systemd deeply: units, targets, dependencies
Logs: journalctl, log rotation
Networking: ports, firewalls, nginx as reverse proxy
Security basics: users, permissions, SSH keys
Monitoring: knowing when something breaks before users do
Hands-on: migrate LUCI services to lucid-luci properly

phases.title: Data Structures and Algorithms — Interview Ready
phases.goal: Pass technical interviews and write more efficient code

modules.title: Core Data Structures
lessons: Arrays and strings: the foundation
Hash maps: O(1) lookup — why LUCI uses dicts everywhere
Stacks and queues
Linked lists
Trees and graphs: the scary ones made simple
Hands-on: implement each structure in Python from scratch

modules.title: Algorithms and Problem Solving
lessons: Big O notation: reading performance like a professional
Binary search: the template
Two pointers and sliding window
Recursion and dynamic programming — the mental model
Graph traversal: BFS and DFS
Hands-on: solve 20 LeetCode problems in Python with LUCI as your tutor
